Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.asset

Class FlixelTypedAsset<T>

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.asset.FlixelTypedAsset<T>
Type Parameters:
T - Asset type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelAsset<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
FlixelGraphic
public class FlixelTypedAsset<T> extends Object implements FlixelAsset<T>
Default pooled implementation of FlixelAsset; constructed only via FlixelAssetManager.obtainTypedAsset(String, Class) or framework subclasses.

      public boolean isPersist()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAsset
      Checks if this asset will be kept in memory after the game state is switched.
      Specified by:
      isPersist in interface FlixelAsset<T>
      Returns:

    • queueLoad

      public void queueLoad()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelAsset
      Enqueues this asset into the active FlixelAssetManager. Safe to call multiple times.

      Use this method to preload assets in your game's loading state.

      Specified by:
      queueLoad in interface FlixelAsset<T>

    • require

      Description copied from interface: FlixelAsset
      Requires the asset to already be loaded.
      Specified by:
      require in interface FlixelAsset<T>
      Returns:
      The loaded asset.

      @NotNull public T loadNow()

      Explicit synchronous load for one-off cases. Avoid using implicitly during gameplay.
